# OCR Domain Index

This directory contains both active OCR guidance and historical rollout material.

## Active Guidance

- `OCR_OPERATIONS_RUNBOOK_2026-03-25.md`: current operating and incident-handling reference for the unified OCR path.
- `OCR_ALIYUN_RAM_STS_MIN_PERMISSION_2026-03-25.md`: current credential and minimum-permission guidance.
- `OCR_BASELINE_EVALUATION_2026-03-25.md`: current evaluation baseline and provider-comparison reference.

## Historical Rollout Material

- `historical/OCR_REFACTOR_EXECUTION_PLAN_2026-03-25.md`
- `historical/OCR_UNIFIED_API_CUTOVER_CHECKLIST_2026-03-25.md`
- `historical/OCR_RELEASE_RUNBOOK_2026-03-25.md`
- `historical/OCR_ROLLBACK_GUIDELINES_2026-03-25.md`
- `historical/OCR_TEST_ENV_E2E_CHECKLIST_2026-03-25.md`
- `historical/OCR_ACCEPTANCE_CHECKLIST_2026-03-25.md`

Use these historical files only when revisiting rollout history, cutover assumptions, rollback procedure, or first-release acceptance context. They should not be the default `Read First` entry for routine OCR code changes.
